---
title: "$L_0$ regularization for subnational microsimulation calibration"
author:
  - name: Maria Juaristi
    affiliation: PolicyEngine
    email: maria@policyengine.org
  - name: Nikhil Woodruff
    affiliation: PolicyEngine
  - name: Ben Ogorek
    affiliation: PolicyEngine
  - name: Max Ghenis
    affiliation: PolicyEngine
date: ""
bibliography: bibliography/references.bib
cite-method: natbib
biblio-style: plainnat
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    classoption: 11pt
    include-in-header:
      - preamble.tex
    keep-tex: true
---

\input{sections/abstract}
\input{sections/introduction}
\input{sections/background}
\input{sections/data}
\input{sections/methodology}
\input{sections/results}
\input{sections/discussion}
\input{sections/conclusion}

\section*{Conflict of interest}
The authors declare no conflict of interest.

\section*{Funding}
This work was supported by PolicyEngine, a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization.

\section*{Data and code availability}
The paper and experiment code live at
\url{https://github.com/PolicyEngine/l0-paper}. The current implementation
target is the Populace stack at
\url{https://github.com/PolicyEngine/populace}. Historical prototype code was
developed in the archived Microplex repositories and is retained only as a
migration reference.

\section*{Use of generative AI}
The authors used Claude (Anthropic) and Codex (OpenAI) for code assistance and
manuscript drafting. All technical content, methodology, and analysis were
designed and validated by the authors.

\input{sections/appendix}
